creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Backtrace of multimedia/vlc.
Non-debug build.

% lldb --core ~/vlc.core --file /usr/local/bin/vlc 
(lldb) target create "/usr/local/bin/vlc" --core "/home/*****/vlc.core"
Core file '/home/*****/vlc.core' (x86_64) was loaded.
